task_completion.description: Create a new base calendar named 'Swing Shift'
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Change Working Time' or 'Calendars' dialog box showing a newly created calendar named 'Swing Shift' in the project management software.

task_completion.description: Set the working hours to 14:00 to 22:00
task_completion.visual_evidence: The working times table for the 'Swing Shift' calendar showing a single shift from 14:00 to 22:00 (or 2:00 PM to 10:00 PM).

task_completion.description: Set working days to Monday through Friday with non-working weekends
task_completion.visual_evidence: The calendar configuration or work weeks tab showing Monday through Friday as default working days and Saturday/Sunday as non-working days.

task_completion.description: Assign the 'Swing Shift' calendar to resource 'Carol Williams'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Resource Sheet or Resource Information dialog showing the resource 'Carol Williams' with her 'Base Calendar' column/setting changed to 'Swing Shift'.

task_completion.description: Save the project as an XML file to the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog saving the file as 'swing_shift_project.xml' in the '/home/ga/Projects/' directory, or a terminal/file explorer verifying the file's creation at that exact path.

integrity.description: Agent used the project management GUI to create the calendar and assign resources
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a project management application (like ProjectLibre) rather than writing XML directly.

integrity.description: Agent did not manually type out the XML file in a text editor
integrity.visual_evidence: No text editors (like nano, vim, gedit) are open with raw XML MS Project schema being manually typed.

integrity.description: Agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the application
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal is not used to run commands like 'echo', 'cp', or 'wget' to instantly generate or download the 'swing_shift_project.xml' file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating a calendar named 'Swing Shift' with working hours 14:00 to 22:00 (14:00:00 to 22:00:00 in XML) for Monday through Friday (DayTypes 2-6). This calendar must be assigned to the resource 'Carol Williams' (Resource ID 3). The final project must be saved as an XML file to '/home/ga/Projects/swing_shift_project.xml'.
